channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Skaven/Rat Player Model
item.description: Adds a Skaven/Rat player model to the game it uses Player Model Lib by Maltiez!

item.title: Level UP
item.description: Add new levels systems to your character

item.title: Aldi's Classes
item.description: An extremely stable, compatible and customizable classes mod!

item.title: Razor's smooth falx (textures in mod folder)
item.description: Custom models for the falx, without the jagged blade and wooden spine.

item.title: ServerKits
item.description: Kits to claim on servers

item.title: SkyTp
item.description: Teleport Gui for Skyblock server

item.title: Rustbound Glacier Ice
item.description: A mod that allows creating galcier ice using rustbound magic frost crystals

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: Razor's smooth falx (textures from game folder)
item.description: Custom models for the falx, without the jagged blade and wooden spine.

item.title: Easy Crafting
item.description: Recettes craftables à côté de la grille ; clic = place, Shift+clic = max.

item.title: Compost-this
item.description: Compost This to accelerate your rot production

item.title: Ancestral Bliss Shaders
item.description: Shaders compatible with most GPUs

item.title: SoldierSpy - Boneworks
item.description: Something to do with all those bones, made with love & pain, no AI

item.title: RKN Generic Crafting
item.description: Generic crafting system that completely replaces the UI grid with a more immersive mechanic

item.title: Murlok Vintage Server Patch
item.description: Collection of tweaks for the Murlok server and playthrough.

item.title: Immersive Inventory Slots
item.description: Removes inventory slots, leaving only the crafting grid

item.title: Death Exile
item.description: Value your life - death has consequences. Die and face a ban, ghost mode, or 24h exile.

item.title: Seraph Girls
item.description: Look cute while you do pottery, starve, and get hunted by horrors beyond comprehension!

item.title: VftRW - Default Voice Pack
item.description: A default voice pack for Voices from the Rust World

item.title: octatonic
item.description: Mod manager via command line interface

item.title: aitranslator
item.description: A mod that translate every other mod into your selected language.

item.title: Rustbound Magic Easy Mode
item.description: Make Rustbound Magic mobs easier to handle

item.title: Fitting Room
item.description: Hover over an item of clothing and press a key to preview your character wearing it.

item.title: Better Hoe
item.description: Adds function to create paths with the hoe.

item.title: Optimum
item.description: High-performance client fork. Compile-time patches, no Harmony. Same gameplay, faster frames

item.title: Salty´s Immersive: Light
item.description: Makes block light respect walls and closed barriers.

item.title: TLH Tweaks (Client)
item.description: Clientside tweaks for my server. Nothing interesting.

item.title: ClimateScalePatch
item.description: ClimateScalePatch modifies climate map generation during worldgen.

item.title: Exotic Milk
item.description: Have you ever wanted milk from an entity that doesnt normally produce milk? Now's your chance!

item.title: Voices from the Rust World
item.description: Human voice narration for Vintage Story lore books, scrolls, and tales from the Rust World in-game.
